GenAiFunction.description: Creates a test drive booking and associated lead record. Call this action only after ALL of the following have been collected and confirmed: vehicle model name, dealership ID, preferred date, time slot, customer full name, email address, phone number, and pincode. Before calling this action, confirm all details with the customer in a summary. Only proceed if the customer confirms. If the output shows success is false, relay the error message to the customer and ask them to correct the information.
